Package com.saperion.constants

Class SaSQLConstants

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.constants.SaSQLConstants
public final class SaSQLConstants extends Object
Database specific constants.

    static org.joda.time.ReadableDateTime
    getMaxDateForDB(String database)
    Returns the minimum date value for the specified database or null, if database is unknown.

    getMinDateForDB(String database)
    Returns the minimum date value for the specified database or null, if database is unknown.

  • Method Details

    • getMinDateForDB

      public static org.joda.time.ReadableDateTime getMinDateForDB(String database)
      Returns the minimum date value for the specified database or null, if database is unknown.
      Parameters:
      database - database name
      Returns:
      minimum date value for the specified databse
      See Also:
      • SaConstants.MSSQL
